sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74270" key="o)cu/zwmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξύ-ζωμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a sharp sauce,</tr_> Apic.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0199.tlg001:6:9:241" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.9.241</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
